svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="AI 视觉验收两场景对照" id="visual-2scene"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-138" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="580" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="380 页 UI 视觉验收 — 分两个场景走" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="500" x="340" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_NEW" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="场景一 · 新功能(有原型锚点)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="540" x="40" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="高保真原型 HTML
("标准答案")" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="80" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="实现页
(Playwright 截图 375×812)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="340" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="① pixelmatch 逐像素比对
图片拦截消除噪音 + 主题色 CSS 断言" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="160" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="四级容差输出
PASS_A / B / WARN_C / FAIL_D" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="300" x="160" y="228" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="回答:功能全实现了吗?
样式和设计稿一致吗?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="380" x="120" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="⚠ 已知硬伤: 内容大幅演进时失真
(原型早期稿 vs 实现加新区, 59%-77% 全 FAIL_D)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="460" x="80" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EN12" edge="1" parent="1" source="N1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="N3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EN22" edge="1" parent="1" source="N2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="N3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EN34" edge="1" parent="1" source="N3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="N4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EN45" edge="1" parent="1" source="N4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="N5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EN56" edge="1" parent="1" source="N5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="N6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_OLD" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="场景二 · 老功能(无原型可比)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="520" x="620" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="① vision 巡查
380 截图 → 启发式筛 → 5% 深审" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="440" x="660" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O1D" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=10;" value="vision 会幻觉 ⚠
红角标→客服按钮 / 浅渐变→白底 / 凭空紫蓝" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="440" x="660" y="146" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="② 代码审计(判真伪的真相源)
design token 基线 + DOM computed-style 扫写死色" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="440" x="660" y="184" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O2D" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=10;" value="423/427 走 token, 4 个文件硬编码(真问题)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="440" x="660" y="238" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="交叉验证
vision 出疑点 → 代码审计判真伪" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="280" x="740" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="回答: 兼容性(新改动没破坏老页)?
历史遗留(老代码藏的不规范)?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="400" x="680" y="328" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="⚠ 回答不了: 老页面"对不对"
没有原型参照, 只能判"有没有变更糟"" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="38" width="440" x="660" y="386" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EO12" edge="1" parent="1" source="O1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="O3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EO23" edge="1" parent="1" source="O2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="O3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EO34" edge="1" parent="1" source="O3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="O4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EO45" edge="1" parent="1" source="O4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="O5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CONC" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="互补不互斥: 新功能保实现完整 + 样式对, 老功能保兼容 + 扫历史遗留 —— 一个版本两边一起跑, 380 页才覆盖得过来" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="980" x="100" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: 互补不互斥: 新功能保实现完整 + 样式对, 老功能保兼容 + 扫历史遗留 —— 一个版本两边一起跑, 380 页才覆盖得过来

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
